title: Xtra Crunchy Chinese Noodles
description: A charred and crunchy Chinese dish featuring dry white wine, perfect for a hangover cure, Xtra Crunchy Chinese Noodles are made with a combination of ingredients that provide a smoky and savory flavor, the smoke-cold and dash-friendly method makes it easy to prepare.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
Drain the noodles and set them aside.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add the dry white wine to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sugar to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and top with chopped scallions and sesame seeds.
